name: @arikajs/logging
description: Flexible, channel-based logging system for the ArikaJS framework.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:tests && node scripts/fix-test-imports.js && node --test 'dist/tests/**/*.test.js'
scripts.test:watch: npm run build && npm run build:tests && node --test --watch 'dist/tests/**/*.test.js'

author: Prakash Tank
